statement: NVIDIA China (including Hong Kong) revenue fell to $4,550 million in Q1 FY2027 from $9,659 million a year earlier, and it is effectively foreclosed from China data-center compute.
why: Export controls roughly halved China revenue and shut NVIDIA out of China data-center compute, a material structural exposure.

impact.mechanism: Export controls and licensing frictions foreclose the China data-center market, cutting addressable GPU demand.

evidence.excerpt: we were effectively foreclosed from competing in China's data center computing/compute market

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: magnitude 2 -> 3; sources: NVIDIA CFO Commentary Q1 FY2027, NVIDIA Form 10-Q Q1 FY2027
